title: bertiera longiloba
intro: Bertiera longiloba is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bertiera longiloba are thought to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Bertiera longiloba is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
